title: myosotis stolonifera subsp. stolonifera
intro: Myosotis stolonifera subsp. stolonifera, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Myosotis. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. Myosotis stolonifera subsp. stolonifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and harness its potential health benefits.
